description: Baseline metadata used by EC-SQL experiment aggregation. The local *_style systems are resource-compatible prompt-style proxies executed inside the unified Spider2 runner; they are not official reproductions of the corresponding papers or repositories.

direct.notes: A single local prompt over the selected schema context.

din_sql_style.notes: A local prompt that follows DIN-SQL's decomposition idea but does not execute the official DIN-SQL code or GPT-4 setup.

dail_sql_style.notes: A local prompt with retrieved schema evidence and in-domain SQL demonstrations; it is not the official DAIL-SQL retrieval/evaluation pipeline.

self_debug_style.notes: A local repair prompt that feeds back the previous error; it is not an official implementation of any single self-debugging system.

mac_sql_style.notes: A local prompt that simulates selector/decomposer/refiner roles; it does not run the official MAC-SQL multi-agent code.

chess_style.notes: A local candidate-and-test prompt inspired by CHESS; it does not run the official CHESS workflow.

schema_only.notes: A deterministic executable fallback used to separate execution safety from semantic correctness.

existing_project.notes: Runs the released starter project without EC-SQL repair.

sqlcoder.notes: Uses a local SQLCoder-family model through the same runner; this is a model baseline rather than the official SQLCoder service or repository workflow.
